provenance.name: Which underlying records explain the metric?
Analytics Filters and saved views API
Analytics Annotations and forecast overlays API

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every metric has one owner, formula, unit, sources, filters, refresh policy, and version.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Dashboards answer a declared decision question.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Drill-down reconciles to the displayed value within documented rounding.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Stale or failed data is visible and never silently presented as current.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Exports enforce the same permissions as interactive views.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Metric changes create a new version and effective date.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Charts include accessible text or tabular alternatives.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Scheduled reports record parameters and source freshness.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
